memoryArtifacts.headline: George Hills not buried at Great Burstead, Essex, England March 1649
memoryArtifacts.description:
Great Burstead, Essex , England March 1649 . George Hills is not listed as buried here on the parish register. Gentleman that included that information on findagrave has no documentation and no idea where he got the date from.
You can view the two individuals buried in March 1649 and does not include George Hills.

zh.lifeSummary: 當George Hills於1578年11月20日出生在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 布爾斯亞德時，他的父親Joseph Hills30歲，母親Sarah Smith30歲。他於1596年10月13日與Mary在英國艾可格亞特 布爾斯亞德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1649年3月24日在英國艾可格亞特 布爾斯亞德享年70歲，埋葬在英國艾可格亞特 布爾斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Hills
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hill
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When George Hills was born on 20 November 1578, in Great Burstead, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Joseph Hills, was 30 and his mother, Sarah Smith, was 30. He married Mary on 13 October 1596, in Great Burstead, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 24 March 1649, in Great Burstead, Essex, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Great Burstead, Essex, England.

Il a épousé Mary le 13 octobre 1596, à Great Burstead, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 24 mars 1649, à Great Burstead, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Great Burstead, Essex, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: George Hills(이)가 1578년 11월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 버스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Joseph Hills(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Smith(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1596년 10월 13일 영국 에세스 그리트 버스테아드에서 Mary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1649년 3월 24일 영국 에세스 그리트 버스테아드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 그리트 버스테아드에 묻혔다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Mary 13 октября 1596 г. в местности грит бурстид, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 24 марта 1649 г. в местности грит бурстид, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности грит бурстид, эссекс, Англия.
